message:
🐛 Guard useSearchIndex against undefined hook data (#1281)

All for-of loops in useSearchIndex now use (data || []) to handle
cases where hook data is undefined (e.g., API 500 errors). Also
guards n.roles.join() with (n.roles || []).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
